basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Rourkela has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 28 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female, 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PWD/Female: 5 years OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ME/M.S. in Electrical/Control Engineering/Energy Engg. or equivalent, relevant to the area of research OR B.Tech/BE in Electrical/Control Engineering or equivalent Engineering, and having a CGPA/CPI score of 7.00 (out of 10.0) and above with a valid GATE score in M.Tech and B.Tech.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech/ME/M.S. in Electrical / Control Engineering/ Energy Engg. or equivalent, relevant to the area of research OR B.Tech/BE in Electrical/ Control Engineering or equivalent Engineering, and having a CGPA/CPI score of 7.00 (out of 10.0) and above with a valid GATE score in M.Tech and B.Tech. Experience: Hands-on experience in modeling, analysis, and control of microgrids integrating renewable energy sources such as solar PV and battery energy storage systems (BESS).

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000.00/- per month (Year 1 & 2) and INR 42,000.00/- per month (Year 3)
salary_details.details: Year 1 & 2: INR 37,000.00/- per month Year 3: INR 42,000.00/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Tech/ME/M.S. in Electrical/Control Engineering/Energy Engg. or equivalent, or a B.Tech/BE in Electrical/Control Engineering with a CGPA/CPI of 7.00 or above and a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/PWD/Female (5 years) and OBC (3 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on shortlisting according to merit and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send a soft copy of their filled application and relevant documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send documents regarding educational qualifications, mark sheets, certificates, research papers (if any), and work experience certificates (if any) as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q9. What should be the subject line of the application email?
faq.answer: The subject line of the email should clearly state the 'Advertisement No.' as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there a walk-in interview for this position?
faq.answer: While the application is via email, the interview details are scheduled for 26th June 2026, suggesting it might be an online interview based on the selection process.
